name: Smartsheet
notes: Free account self-generates a bearer access token (or 3-legged OAuth2) against a documented REST API; official MCP server at mcp.smartsheet.com is GA.

name: Stripe
notes: Self-serve signup yields test/sandbox and live secret API keys for a REST API (OAuth2 for Connect); official remote MCP server at mcp.stripe.com.

name: Paygent Connect
notes: Japanese payment gateway requiring a signed merchant contract plus client certificates and merchant_id/connect_id/connect_password credentials; no self-serve signup or public keys.

name: higgsfield
notes: Higgsfield Cloud offers self-serve API keys (Bearer) for a REST video/image-gen API with a Python SDK; docs sit behind login and only community MCP wrappers exist.

name: NotebookLM
notes: No standalone public API; only a Preview NotebookLM Enterprise REST API on Google Cloud requiring an org, NotebookLM Enterprise licenses, a GCP project and IAM roles (OAuth2 access tokens).
